query: INSERT INTO artworks (title, description, image_url, image_key, gallery_images, year, medium, dimensions, available, featured, for_sale, display_order) VALUES ('Bo Carter', 'Upcycled vintage LP, 12"x12"', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663325255079/yyLwjcyVrZWmUvwE.jpeg', 'bo-carter-main', '["https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663325255079/yyLwjcyVrZWmUvwE.jpeg","https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663325255079/TGNsMbsGdWXQhRmCtYbG6q/bo-carter-detail_70d6a08b.jpeg","https://d2xsxph8kpxj0f.cloudfront.net/310519663325255079/TGNsMbsGdWXQhRmCtYbG6q/bo-carter-full_8d971c69.jpeg"]', 2026, 'Upcycled vintage LP', '12"x12"', 'sold', 0, 0, 75);
